arts.ttl: Fiorentina vs Torino for three important points
arts.sum: Fiorentina have kept a clean sheet in each of their last three Serie A matches against Torino (W2 D1), as many times as in their previous 14; the Viola have not recorded four clean sheets in a row against the Granata in the competition since October 1969. Torino have won 50 Serie A matches against Fiorentina (D51 L50), more than against any other team in the competition.

arts.ttl: Torino’s Pursuit of Chelsea’s Casadei Intensifies with London Meeting
arts.sum: Torino's interest in Chelsea midfielder Cesare Casadei has taken a significant step forward as the Italian club's sporting director, Davide Vagnati, made a swift trip to London to accelerate negotiations. Gianluca Di Marzio reports that the Serie A side is keen to secure the services of the 21-year-old midfielder, who has struggled to find regular playing time in the Premier League this season. The post Torino’s Pursuit of Chelsea’s Casadei Intensifies with London Meeting appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Serie A | Fiorentina v Torino: Match Preview
arts.sum: As Fiorentina prepare to host Torino in a crucial Serie A clash this Sunday, the stakes are high for both teams. Fiorentina, who have struggled recently, will be looking to halt a troubling run of form, while Torino aims to build on their recent performances as they seek to climb the league table. arts.ttl: Fiorentina Explore Potential Move for Bryan Cristante
arts.sum: As the winter transfer window progresses, Fiorentina have initiated inquiries regarding Bryan Cristante, the Roma midfielder. The club, under the management of Raffaele Palladino, are considering a strategic move to bolster their midfield options with the addition of the 29-year-old player. The post Fiorentina Explore Potential Move for Bryan Cristante appeared first on FootItalia.com.
